Programs

The proof
is in the programs.

Three flagship programs. Each one evidence. Each one infrastructure. Each one a proof point for the doctrine.

01 Flagship

McCartney Academy

Black-centered K–12 private school. Lineage-centered curriculum. STEM, leadership, emerging technologies. Built in Liberty City. Designed to produce the next generation of institutional architects.

Phase I — Founding Cohort
02 Flagship

FarmBlock

Cooperative urban agriculture. Anti-food-apartheid infrastructure. 50+ cities surveyed for Phase II feasibility. Land stewardship, food sovereignty, and circular economics in practice.

Phase II — Scaling
03 Flagship

Block to the Boardroom

Civic leadership pipeline. Training community members in governance, public policy, and institutional management. From neighborhood blocks to boardroom tables.

Active — Cohort Forming

Other Programs

Restitution 246

Research framework. Craemer (2015) methodology. Open record, auditable, built to be cited.

Innovation Lab

Emerging technologies, AI systems, and sovereign tools for community use.

First Offering

The store. The covenant made tangible. Products from the work, for the work.

Black Dragons Initiative

Security, resilience, and sovereign capability for Black-led institutions.

Want to fund a program?
Give to the work.

Donate Now
E5 Enclave

Sovereign institutional infrastructure.
Founded 2024. Liberty City, Miami.
